content.query:
SELECT 
    -- Identification Attributes
    cst.LP_CustomerID as cst_id,
    LOWER(cst.FirstName) first_name,
    LOWER(cst.LastName) last_name,
    LOWER(cst.Address1) address1,
    LOWER(ISNULL(NULLIF(cst.City, ''), 'unknown')) addr_city,
    LOWER(ISNULL(NULLIF(cst.State, ''), 'unknown')) addr_state,
    LOWER(ISNULL(NULLIF(cst.Zip, ''), 'unknown')) addr_zip,
    cst.Phone phone,
   LOWER(ISNULL(NULLIF(cst.Email, ''), 'unknown@unknown.com')) email,

    -- Renuity Lead Attributes
    LOWER(CONVERT(VARCHAR, MONTH(lds.EntryDate), 103)) date_month,
    LOWER(CONVERT(VARCHAR, YEAR(lds.EntryDate), 103)) date_year,
    LOWER(ISNULL(NULLIF(prd.ProductName, ''), 'unknown')) product,
    LOWER(ISNULL(NULLIF(lds.LeadSourceID, ''), 'unknown')) source,
    LOWER(ISNULL(NULLIF(srs.SourceCode, ''), 'unknown')) sub_source,
    LOWER(ISNULL(NULLIF(rnk.Rank, ''), 'unknown')) rank,
    LOWER(ISNULL(NULLIF(sds.LongName, ''), 'unknown')) district,
    lds.Sold -- Value to Predict
FROM
    [EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
    INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst on lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
    INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_SALES_DISTRICT] sds on lds.SalesDistrictID =  sds.SalesDistrictID
    INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_RANK] rnk on lds.RankID =  rnk.RankID
    INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE] srs on lds.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
    INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT] prd on lds.ProductID = prd.ProductID
WHERE lds.EntryDate = convert(varchar(10), getdate(), 102) -- from today only







SELECT
lds.Division
,srs.SourceCode
--,srs.LeadSubSourceID
,srs.LeadSubSource
,brn.LongName as Market
,prd.ProductName as ProductID
,prd.LongDescription as Product
--,dsp.Comments as Disposition
--,cast(lds.EntryDate as Date) as EntryDate
,MONTH(cast(lds.EntryDate as Date)) as EntryDateMonth
--,YEAR(cast(lds.EntryDate as Date)) as EntryDateYear
--,appt.[ApptDate]
--,appt.SetDate
--,lds.LeadID
--,cst.CustomerID
--,cst.FirstName
--,cst.LastName
--,cst.Email
--,cst.Phone
,cst.Address1
,cst.City
,cst.[State]
,cst.Zip
--,lds.ApptSet
--,lds.NetIssued
--,lds.Sat
--,jbs.JobStatus
--,jsc.JobStatusCategory
--,job.ContractDate
--,job.GrossAmount
,case
    when job.GrossAmount is NULL then 0
    else job.GrossAmount
end as [GrossAmount]
--,case 
--    when jsc.JobStatusCategory is NULL then 0
--    when jsc.JobStatusCategory in ('Cancelled', 'Credit Decline') then 0 
--    else job.GrossAmount
--end
--as [NetSalesAmount]
,lds.Sold -- PREDICTOR
FROM 
[EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
inner join [EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT] prd
on lds.ProductID = prd.ProductID
left join [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
on lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
left join (
    SELECT 
        [LeadID]
        ,MAX([ApptDate]) as [ApptDate]
        ,MAX(SetDate) as [SetDate]
    FROM 
        [EDW].[FACT_APPOINTMENT]
    WHERE 
        Division in ('MAC')
    group by 
    LeadID
) appt
on lds.LeadID = appt.LeadID
inner join [EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE] srs
on lds.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
inner join [EDW].[DIM_DISPOSITION] dsp
on lds.DispositionID = dsp.DispositionID
left join [EDW].[DIM_BRANCH] brn
on lds.BranchID = brn.BranchID
left join [EDW].[FACT_JOB] job
on lds.LeadID = job.LeadID
left join [EDW].[DIM_JOB_STATUS] jbs
on job.JobStatusID = jbs.JobStatusID
left join [EDW].[DIM_JOB_STATUS_CATEGORY] jsc
on jbs.JobStatusCategoryID = jsc.JobStatusCategoryID
where 
        --lds.BranchID in ('MAC-GSMAD','MAC-GSCLT') and
         cst.Address1 is not NULL
and     cst.City is not NULL
and     cst.[State] is not NULL
and     cst.Zip is not NULL
and     YEAR(GETDATE()) - YEAR(cast(lds.EntryDate as Date)) = 1 -- Data that is one year old...
and     cst.[State] in ('FL')



-- TRANS UNION QUERIES

------------- FIVE 9 - DATASET ------------- 

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM(
    SELECT

        lds.LeadID lds_id,
        cst.CustomerID cst_id,

        NULLIF(REPLACE(REPLACE(cst.FirstName, ',', ''), '&', ''),'') cst_first_name,
        NULLIF(REPLACE(REPLACE(cst.LastName, ',', ''), '&', ''),'') cst_last_name,
        NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(cst.Address1)), '') cst_addr1,
        NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(cst.State)), '') cst_state,
        NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(cst.City)), '') cst_city,
        NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(cst.Zip)), '') cst_zip,
        NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(cst.Phone)), '') cst_phone,
        NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(cst.Email)), '') cst_email,

        --lds.LeadSourceID lds_lead_souce_id,
        lsr.LeadSource lead_sourcecode,
        lsr.UNI_SourceCode uni_sourcecode,
        lsr.UNI_SourceGroup uni_sourcegroup,

        lds.LP_BranchID lp_branch_id,
        
        --lds.SalesDistrictID lds_district_id, -- same as lp_branch_id
        --LOWER(sds.LP_SalesDistrictID) lp_district_id, -- same as lp_branch_id
        
        --lds.LeadSubSourceID lds_subsource_id,
        srs.SourceCode lp_source_code,
        srs.LeadSubSource lp_sub_source,

        lds.Division lds_division,

        ISNULL(NULLIF(prd.ProductName, ''), 'unknown') prd_product,

        --lds.EntryDate lds_entrydate,
        five9.DIVISION f9_division,
        five9.DIVISION_ORIG f9_division_orig,
        five9.TIMESTAMP f9_division_timestamp,
        five9.DATE f9_date,
        five9.HOUR f9_hour,
        five9.TIME f9_time,
        five9.CALL_TYPE f9_call_type,
        five9.CAMPAIGN_TYPE f9_campaign_type,
        five9.CAMPAIGN f9_campaign,
        five9.CUSTOMER_NAME f9_customer_name,
        five9.CALLS f9_calls,
        five9.LIST_NAME f9_list_name,
        five9.AGENT_GROUP f9_agent_group,
        five9.AGENT_NAME f9_agent_name,
        five9.DISPOSITION f9_disposition, 
        five9.NUMBER_OF_ATTEMPTS f9_number_attempts, 
        five9.MANUAL_TIME f9_manual_time,
        five9.HANDLE_TIME f9_handle_time,
        five9.ANI f9_ani, -- Automatic Number Identification (to) [customer phone number]
        five9.DNIS f9_dnis, -- Dialed Number Identification Service (from),
        five9.CONTACT_CREATE_DATE_TIME f9_contact_created_dt,
        five9.NUMBER1 f9_phone, -- customer phone
        five9.CALL_TIME f9_call_time,
        five9.DIAL_TIME f9_dial_time,
        five9.CONTACTED f9_contacted
    FROM 
        [EDW].[FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL] five9
        INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst ON cst.Phone = five9.NUMBER1
        INNER JOIN [EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds on cst.CustomerID = lds.CustomerID
        --INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_SALES_DISTRICT] sds on lds.SalesDistrictID =  sds.SalesDistrictID
        INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE] srs on lds.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
        INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT] prd on lds.ProductID = prd.ProductID
        INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SOURCE] lsr on lsr.LeadSourceID = lds.LeadSourceID
    WHERE
        five9.CAMPAIGN LIKE '%Outbound%' AND
        five9.DATE BETWEEN '2023-11-01' AND '2023-11-30'
) fx

-- lds.LeadSourceID
SELECT top(100) * from [EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SOURCE]

------------- SALES - DATASET ------------- 

select count(*) from(
-- New Set for Testing
SELECT
    top(10000)
    cst.CustomerID cst_id,
    lds.LeadID lds_id,
    
    NULLIF(REPLACE(REPLACE(cst.FirstName, ',', ''), '&', ''),'') cst_first_name,
    NULLIF(REPLACE(REPLACE(cst.LastName, ',', ''), '&', ''),'') cst_last_name,
    NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(cst.Address1)), '') cst_addr1,
    NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(cst.State)), '') cst_state,
    NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(cst.City)), '') cst_city,
    NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(cst.Zip)), '') cst_zip,
    NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(cst.Phone)), '') cst_phone,
    NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(cst.Email)), '') cst_email,
    
    MONTH(lds.EntryDate) lds_entry_month,
    YEAR(lds.EntryDate) lds_entry_year,

    lds.LeadSourceID lds_lead_souce_id,
    lds.BranchID lds_branch_id,
    --lds.SalesDistrictID lds_district_id,
    lds.LeadSubSourceID lds_subsource_id,
    lds.EntryDate lds_entrydate,

    ISNULL(NULLIF(prd.ProductName, ''), 'unknown') prd_product,
    
    srs.SourceCode srs_source,

    fct.Sold
     
FROM
    [EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
    INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst on lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
    INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_SALES_DISTRICT] sds on lds.SalesDistrictID =  sds.SalesDistrictID
    INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE] srs on lds.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
    INNER JOIN [EDW].[FACT_LEAD] fct on lds.CustomerID = fct.CustomerID
    INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT] prd on lds.ProductID = prd.ProductID
WHERE lds.EntryDate BETWEEN '2023-08-31' AND '2024-12-31'
AND cst.Address1 IS NOT NULL
AND cst.City IS NOT NULL
and cst.State IS NOT NULL
and cst.Zip IS NOT NULL
and lds.Division LIKE 'MXH'
and fct.Sold = 1
) alz



select top(100) * from [EDW].[DIM_SALES_DISTRICT] sds on lds.SalesDistrictID =  sds.SalesDistrictID
select top(100) * from [EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE] srs on lds.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
